## 📖 Describe the Documentation Issue

What documentation is missing or incorrect?

## 🔗 Related Documentation

Link to the documentation page or file that needs improvement.

## 📝 Suggested Improvement

How should this documentation be improved?

## 🎯 Affected Users

Who would benefit from this documentation improvement?

## 📸 Current vs Expected

What does it currently say vs what should it say?

### Current
```
[Include current documentation or screenshot]
```

### Expected
```
[Include what it should say]
```

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing documentation
- [ ] This is not already covered elsewhere
- [ ] I've described the issue clearly
- [ ] I've suggested improvements

---

**Great documentation helps everyone!**
